stories.title: Inside the historic comeback: Takeaways from Knick...
stories.summary: ESPN NBA insiders break down New York's stunning Game 4 win at the Garden.

stories.title: Knicks stage historic comeback, on brink of title
stories.summary: The Knicks made a record comeback from 29 points down and moved to the brink of their first championship since 1973 by beating the Spurs on Wednesday.

stories.title: Mahomes to make over $500M in reworked deal
stories.summary: The Chiefs are adding two years to Patrick Mahomes' contract in a reworked contract that ties him to Kansas City through 2033 at a value of $504.75 million, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Ohtani rues non-challenge as LA blows 5-run lead
stories.summary: Shohei Ohtani cruised through the first six innings Wednesday before things unraveled in the seventh, including a missed ABS challenge that helped the Pirates rally and set the stage for a 9-8 win over the Dodgers.

stories.title: Spain, France open World Cup as betting favorites
stories.summary: France and Spain are the betting favorites to win the 2026 World Cup, while heavy backing for Team USA is creating massive liabilities for sportsbooks.
